title: jurighas decipiens
side_effects: Jurighas decipiens can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe allergic reactions, liver damage, and cardiovascular issues. Prolonged use of the plant's extracts can lead to headaches, dizziness, and nausea. In extreme cases, it may cause respiratory failure and even death. Additionally, improper use of jurighas decipiens can also disrupt hormone balances and lead to irregular menstrual cycles in women.
